subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, my Lord and my Support! I beseech Thee by the movement of Thy Pen of Destiny and by the traces of Thy Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی و سیدی و سندی اسئلک بتحریر قلم تقدیرک و باثار قلمک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for detachment
